I2C communication, driver implementation, and register definitions for the LIS3DH accelerometer.


## Files
- **[config.c](config.c.md)**: I2C communication procedures and configuration functions for the LIS3DH accelerometer.
- **[lis3dh.c](lis3dh.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the LIS3DH accelerometer, including initialization, data reading, and interrupt handling.
- **[lis3dh.h](lis3dh.h.md)**: Header file for the LIS3DH accelerometer driver, defining constants, enums, and functions for configuration and control.
- **[registers.h](registers.h.md)**: Defines register addresses and bit masks for the LIS3DH accelerometer.
